# Domain Good Knowledge Base

A clean fixture domain exercising every parser and verify feature without
triggering any issue.

## Scope

- Facts about small moons, companion planting and a task tracking schema
- Cross references between engrams inside this domain

## When to Use

- When asked about Phobos or other small moons
- When asked about companion planting for pollinators
- When asked how the task schema validates task engrams

## Notes for Agents

- This domain intentionally stays self-contained so it verifies clean.
